# Prism Blog (LLMs)

Canonical zone URL: /blog

This is the blog zone for Prism.

Important pages:
- /blog
- /blog/index
- /blog/posts/hello-multizone
- /blog/posts/advanced-routing

API endpoints:
- /blog/api/search?q=<query>
- /blog/api/og?title=<title>&section=<section>

For expanded context, see:
- /blog/llms-full.txt
